wiki.summary: “Hurt” is twelfth track on Oliver Tree’s debut album, "Ugly Is Beautiful". It deals with a scooter accident which Oliver experienced at a competition when he was 18, which caused a serious injury. He reflects upon this injury and how that even if he makes these tricks someone will eventually come and make a better one. It also deals with the reaction of the accident by other people and how in general his life has changed due to his career and fame. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “Hurt” is twelfth track on Oliver Tree’s debut album, "Ugly Is Beautiful". It deals with a scooter accident which Oliver experienced at a competition when he was 18, which caused a serious injury. He reflects upon this injury and how that even if he makes these tricks someone will eventually come and make a better one. It also deals with the reaction of the accident by other people and how in general his life has changed due to his career and fame. "'The song “Hurt” is about a scooter accident I had when I was 18. I was in a semipro freestyle contest. I come in on this 20-foot roll, and I drop in full speed going. Out of nowhere, this mini pebble shows up. This thing just pops out. I hit it with my front wheel. I go flying both arms out. I break my left wrist, my right wrist, and the joint that connects the thumb bone to the hand. This thing is just dangling. I had to get a metal rod through my fucking hand for the entire summer. Couldn’t feed myself or wipe my own ass the entire summer. Luckily, I had a girlfriend who loved me.'" "'There’s a lot of different influences that go into this song specifically, but if I was to list really the primary influence, it would probably be “Sandstorm” by Darude. Have you heard that? That was fucking incredible. You gotta check that out.'" Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
